## Highlights

- Practical Windows-first desktop PDF workflows
- Portable packaged app for non-Python users
- Core workflows ready immediately; OCR remains optional for this release

## Install

1. Download `pdf-toolkit-windows-x64.zip`.
2. Extract it to a normal folder such as `Documents\PDF Toolkit`.
3. Run `pdf-toolkit-gui.exe`.

## OCR note

OCR is not bundled in the default public release yet. Core merge, split, preview, extraction, metadata, and automation workflows are still available without extra setup.
